---
title: "Portfolio"
Author: Angie Kochkarova
Published: May 16th 2026
---

## Course Lessons

-   Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto
-   Tidy Data
-   Cleaning and Wrangling Data
-   Data Visualization
-   Plotting with ggplot2
-   Collaborative Reports and Publishing to the Web
-   Writing Functions
-   Project Management with Github

## Assignment Links

-   [Introduction to Quarto](assignments/a01.html)

-   [Data Cleaning Assignment](assignments/a02.html)
